executiveSummary: NovaStar Insurance Group has a mature, high-adoption Salesforce environment — 85% of agents are logging in daily, and the platform is the central system of record for all 38,000 active cases. The assessment found one hard blocker: a knowledge base of just 8 published articles serving 20 distinct case categories. This single gap prevents a reliable Agentforce deployment, as the agent would be unable to ground its responses in the organisation's own policies and procedures. The good news is that this is the only blocker, and it is entirely within the team's control to fix in a focused sprint. Complete the roadmap in Section 5 and NovaStar's AI Readiness Index moves from 69 to a projected 95+ within 12–16 weeks.

domainSummaries.Data quality & completeness: Contact records are mostly complete, though 18% are missing email addresses — largely from a broker intake process that pre-dates the current data standards. Phone and Title fields have slightly higher gaps (35% and 42% respectively) from the same legacy import. A bulk enrichment project has been scoped and is planned for Q3 2026. Duplicate rates are low (3.4% on Contact, 2.0% on Account) and within acceptable bounds.
domainSummaries.Automation health & conflicts: NovaStar has 52 active flows covering the full claims and service lifecycle. 18 of these flows are missing fault connectors — all were built before fault-path standards were adopted in 2024. These can be remediated in a single admin sprint (estimated 2 days). Three legacy Process Builder automations remain active on the Case object; these should be consolidated into the existing Flow architecture. Apex test coverage is 57% — below the recommended 75% floor for AI-assisted environments.
domainSummaries.Security & permission model: The Security Health Check score is 80/100 with 3 critical risks flagged. The admin team confirmed that MFA is enforced org-wide and that the guest user profile is fully locked down. The 3 critical flags relate to password policy settings (minimum complexity) and session timeout thresholds — both are addressable via a single Security Settings update by the system administrator.
domainSummaries.Knowledge base & grounding: This is NovaStar's primary AI readiness blocker. The knowledge base contains 8 published articles, all focused on billing and general policy terms. The scan identified 20 distinct case reason categories in the last 12 months — 12 of these have no corresponding article. The highest-volume uncovered categories are Claim Status (12%), Coverage Question (10%), and Payment Problem (9%). Agentforce requires article grounding to deflect cases reliably; without coverage of these categories the agent will escalate to human agents at an unacceptably high rate. Building articles for the top 20 categories is the single highest-ROI action on the roadmap.
domainSummaries.Metadata & technical debt: NovaStar has 260 unmanaged custom fields — slightly above the 200-field advisory threshold. These accumulated over two earlier CRM migrations (2018 and 2021). The current admin has a field audit scheduled for Q4 2026. No abandoned AppExchange packages were found, which is a positive signal. The metadata debt is manageable and does not block Agentforce deployment.
domainSummaries.User adoption & process alignment: Adoption is a clear strength. 85% of NovaStar's 320 licensed users logged in within the last 90 days, and the average agent logs 12 service activities per 90-day period — comfortably above the industry median of 8. The service operations manager confirmed that a third-party telephony integration logs call outcomes directly to Case records, which accounts for the slightly lower Task count. The high login rate means Agentforce will enter an environment where agents are already comfortable with Salesforce as their primary tool.
domainSummaries.Platform limits & API headroom: API usage is at 5% of the daily limit. Data storage is at 8% and file storage at 6%. NovaStar has substantial headroom to absorb the additional API calls, data writes, and audit trail storage that Agentforce conversation logs will generate at full deployment scale. No action required.
